title: Custom Queries + Service — Product Search API
description:
### Your Task

Build an enhanced Product API with search/filter capabilities.

### Requirements

- `Product` entity: `id` (Long), `name` (String), `category` (String), `price` (Double), `inStock` (Boolean), `brand` (String)
- `ProductRepository` with custom finders:
  - `findByCategory(String category)`
  - `findByBrand(String brand)`
  - `findByInStockTrue()`
  - `findByPriceLessThanEqual(Double maxPrice)`
- `ProductService`, `ProductController` at `/api/products`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/products` → all (200)
- `GET /api/products/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/products/category/{category}` → by category (200)
- `GET /api/products/brand/{brand}` → by brand (200)
- `GET /api/products/in-stock` → in-stock only (200)
- `GET /api/products/max-price/{maxPrice}` → price <= maxPrice (200)
- `POST /api/products` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/products/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/products/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
